name: open-cowork
description: Desktop workspace for OpenCode sessions, agents, tools, skills, and workflows
author: Joe Broadhead

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm design-tokens:build && corepack pnpm build:mcps && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/desktop dev
scripts.build: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm design-tokens:build && corepack pnpm build:mcps && corepack pnpm build:gateway && corepack pnpm build:standalone-gateway && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/desktop build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm design-tokens:build && corepack pnpm typecheck:cloud-server && corepack pnpm typecheck:mcps && corepack pnpm typecheck:gateway && corepack pnpm typecheck:standalone-gateway && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/desktop build:electron && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/desktop typecheck
scripts.dist: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/desktop dist
scripts.lint: eslint . --max-warnings 0 && corepack pnpm design-tokens:check && node scripts/lint.mjs && node scripts/check-design-token-usage.mjs && node scripts/check-import-cycles.mjs && node scripts/build-docs-mermaid-vendor.mjs --check && node scripts/check-preload-channels.mjs && node scripts/check-shared-dist.mjs
scripts.test: corepack pnpm test:prepare && corepack pnpm --filter=./packages/* test && corepack pnpm --filter=./mcps/* test && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway test && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/standalone-gateway test && node scripts/run-node-tests.mjs
scripts.test:prepare: corepack pnpm build:shared && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/runtime-host build && corepack pnpm design-tokens:build && node scripts/ensure-electron-binary.mjs
scripts.test:cloud-continuation: corepack pnpm test:prepare && corepack pnpm build:gateway && node scripts/run-node-tests.mjs tests/cloud-continuation-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: corepack pnpm test:coverage:node && corepack pnpm test:coverage:renderer && node scripts/coverage-summary.mjs --check
scripts.test:coverage:node: corepack pnpm test:prepare && corepack pnpm --filter=./packages/* test && corepack pnpm --filter=./mcps/* test && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway test && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/standalone-gateway test && node scripts/run-node-tests.mjs --coverage && node scripts/run-workspace-node-tests.mjs --coverage && node scripts/coverage-summary.mjs --check --node-only --no-write
scripts.test:windows-prepackage: corepack pnpm test:prepare && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/cloud-client build && node scripts/check-preload-channels.mjs && node scripts/run-node-tests.mjs tests/artifact-index.test.ts tests/session-artifact-access.test.ts tests/ipc-handler-registration.test.ts tests/desktop-after-pack.test.ts tests/update-service.test.ts tests/update-check-version.test.ts tests/update-release-source.test.ts tests/release-windows-signing-mode.test.ts tests/runtime-environment.test.ts tests/packaged-executable-preflight.test.ts tests/windows-signing-targets.test.ts
scripts.cloud:smoke: corepack pnpm cloud:build && corepack pnpm cloud:smoke:import
scripts.deploy:standalone-gateway:smoke: corepack pnpm build:standalone-gateway && node apps/standalone-gateway/dist/main.js smoke
scripts.deploy:continuation:smoke: corepack pnpm build:gateway && corepack pnpm build:shared && node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types scripts/cloud-continuation-smoke.mjs
scripts.ops:validate: node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-opencode-compatibility.ts && node scripts/validate-ops-readiness.mjs && node scripts/validate-release-gates.mjs
